# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for all resources."
      }
    },
    "appServicePlanName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "asp-webapp-stack"
    },
    "webAppName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Globally unique name for the web app."
      }
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Globally unique name for the SQL server."
      }
    },
    "sqlAdminLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL administrator login."
      }
    },
    "sqlAdminPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL administrator password."
      }
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "appdb"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Globally unique storage account name, 3-24 lowercase letters and numbers."
      }
    },
    "appServicePlanSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "B1",
      "allowedValues": [
        "B1",
        "B2",
        "B3",
        "S1",
        "S2",
        "S3",
        "P1v2",
        "P2v2",
        "P3v2"
      ]
    },
    "sqlDatabaseSkuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseTier": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "appServicePlanResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]",
    "sqlServerResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]",
    "storageAccountResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]",
    "sqlConnectionString": "[concat('Server=tcp:', parameters('sqlServerName'), '.database.windows.net,1433;Initial Catalog=', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), ';Persist Security Info=False;User ID=', parameters('sqlAdminLogin'), ';Password=', parameters('sqlAdminPassword'), ';MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "properties": {
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false,
        "accessTier": "Hot"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('sqlAdminLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('sqlAdminPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled",
        "minimalTlsVersion": "1.2"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/AllowAzureServices')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[variables('sqlServerResourceId')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[variables('sqlServerResourceId')]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseSkuName')]",
        "tier": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseTier')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
        "maxSizeBytes": 2147483648
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
      "apiVersion": "2022-09-01",
      "name": "[parameters('appServicePlanName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('appServicePlanSku')]",
        "tier": "[if(or(equals(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'B1'), equals(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'B2'), equals(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'B3')), 'Basic', if(or(equals(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'S1'), equals(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'S2'), equals(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'S3')), 'Standard', 'PremiumV2'))]",
        "size": "[parameters('appServicePlanSku')]",
        "capacity": 1
      },
      "kind": "app",
      "properties": {
        "reserved": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2022-09-01",
      "name": "[parameters('webAppName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[variables('appServicePlanResourceId')]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
        "[variables('storageAccountResourceId')]"
      ],
      "kind": "app",
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[variables('appServicePlanResourceId')]",
        "httpsOnly": true,
        "siteConfig": {
          "alwaysOn": "[if(or(equals(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'S1'), equals(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'S2'), equals(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'S3'), equals(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'P1v2'), equals(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'P2v2'), equals(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'P3v2')), true(), false())]",
          "ftpsState": "Disabled",
          "minTlsVersion": "1.2",
          "connectionStrings": [
            {
              "name": "DefaultConnection",
              "connectionString": "[variables('sqlConnectionString')]",
              "type": "SQLAzure"
            }
          ],
          "appSettings": [
            {
              "name": "WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE",
              "value": "0"
            },
            {
              "name": "StorageAccountName",
              "value": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
            },
            {
              "name": "StorageConnectionString",
              "value": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(variables('storageAccountResourceId'), '2023-01-01').keys[0].value, ';EndpointSuffix=', environment().suffixes.storage)]"
            },
            {
              "name": "SqlServerName",
              "value": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
            },
            {
              "name": "SqlDatabaseName",
              "value": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "webAppName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('webAppName')]"
    },
    "webAppUrl": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[concat('https://', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('webAppName'))).defaultHostName)]"
    },
    "sqlServerFullyQualifiedDomainName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(variables('sqlServerResourceId')).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    }
  }
}
